column1: # Editable known-contacts map for Interac e-transfer classification.
#   contact : counterparty name from the email-extractor CONTACT field
#             (case-insensitive; matched if this text appears in the recovered name).
#   sending to a BUSINESS contact   -> Category = EXPENSES
#   receiving from a BUSINESS contact -> Category = REVENUE
# Names ending in INC/LTD/CORP/etc. are auto-treated as business (no entry needed).
# Anything not matched here and without a company suffix stays UNRESOLVED -> highlighted.
